constraints.team: 4 engineers (1 backend, 1 frontend, 1 DevOps, 1 QA), plus part-time product manager
constraints.timeline: 6-month development and deployment cycle

operational_requirements.throughput: support up to 15,000 scheduled posts daily
operational_requirements.latency: average delay between scheduled time and actual post < 2 minutes

brief.risk_context: If the system goes down, scheduled posts may not be published, leading to missed marketing opportunities, reduced engagement, and potential loss of revenue. brief.hidden_fragility_seed: Single point of failure in the message queuing system that, if not replicated, could halt all posting activity during a server outage or network partition.
